image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about VAERS limitations than social media does.
Context visual: VAERS, or the Vaccine Adverse Event Reporting System, collects data on vaccine side effects.
Escalation visual: But here’s the catch: VAERS reports can be incomplete and unverified.
Evidence visual: Studies show that many reports are coincidental, not causal. Context matters.
Payoff visual: Understanding these limitations helps us see the bigger picture—vaccines are still safe and effective.
Cta visual: Stay informed. Like and share for more insights on health and science.
